//1: Configuration for Apple open source toolchain (clang + OSS headers)
//2: Used for distributed compilation of non-SDK-dependent Apple platform files
//4: If MainVersion is empty, auto-selects based on XcodeToToolchainVersion mapping
//5: Subdirectory paths relative to the version directory
//6: Same path on all hosts enables simple UBA Host{Platform} substitution
//7: Maps Xcode version to toolchain directory prefix (vN)
//9: Xcode    | Apple Clang | LLVM    | Prefix | Auto SDK Directory
